title: Braised Oxtail in Malaysian-Style Caramelized Sauce
description: A hearty and flavorful braised oxtail dish infused with the rich flavors of Malaysian cuisine, topped with a sweet and sticky caramelized sauce.
instructions: Stir-fry the oxtail pieces in hot oil until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, and chili peppers to the wok and stir-fry until the vegetables are softened.
Pour in the coconut milk, fish sauce (if using), and caramelized sauce.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the oxtail hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
